nasb.text: And now many nations have been assembled against you Who say, ‘Let her be polluted, And let our eyes gloat over Zion.’

esv.text: Now many nations are assembled against you, saying, “Let her be defiled, and let our eyes gaze upon Zion.”

cnv.text: 現在多國的民集合起來， 攻擊你，說：‘願錫安被蹂躪， 願我們親眼看見錫安遭報應。’”

ccb.text: 现在许多国家一起来攻击你们，说： “愿锡安遭蹂躏， 我们要看着锡安被毁灭。”
